actions.name: Dagger
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sacred Flame
actions.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a dexterity saving throw or take 1d8 radiant damage. The target gains no benefit from cover for this saving throw.

actions.name: Command
actions.description: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. The spell has no effect if the target is undead, if it doesn't understand your language, or if your command is directly harmful to it.

actions.name: Inflict Wounds
actions.description: Make a melee spell attack against a creature you can reach. On a hit, the target takes 3d10 necrotic damage.

actions.name: Hold Person
actions.description: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make another wisdom saving throw. On a success, the spell ends on the target.

special_abilities.name: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The fanatic makes two melee attacks.

special_abilities.name: Dark Devotion
special_abilities.description: The fanatic has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.description:
The fanatic is a 4th-level spellcaster. Its spell casting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 11, +3 to hit with spell attacks). The fanatic has the following cleric spells prepared:

Cantrips (at will): light, sacred flame, thaumaturgy
- 1st level (4 slots): command, inflict wounds, shield of faith
- 2nd level (3 slots): hold person, spiritual weapon

bonus_actions.name: Shield of Faith
bonus_actions.description: A shimmering field appears and surrounds a creature of your choice within range, granting it a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.

bonus_actions.name: Spiritual Weapon
bonus_actions.description: You create a floating, spectral weapon within range that lasts for the duration or until you cast this spell again. When you cast the spell, you can make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 feet of the weapon. On a hit, the target takes force damage equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting abil
